title: 修复无 active 状态生成后的 ownership 闭环

sources.reason: No-active status repair and ownership behavior under review.
Ownership evidence behavior exposed the stale generated status path.
R9 status model and gate consistency requirement.

riskAssessment.reason: The no-active generated status must be covered by the current cleanup evidence without modifying immutable prior summaries.

executionDecision.reason: This cleanup records and verifies generated no-active status ownership without changing archived evidence.

preReviewWarnings: Do not rewrite archived N5/N6 Summary files; use this cleanup Work Item as the ownership record.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The no-active generated current_status change is owned by this cleanup Work Item without modifying prior archived evidence.
Status consistency, diff ownership, and no-active PR gates pass.
The cleanup Contract and Summary are archived and the local commit contains no unowned paths.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: A generated no-active current_status change was not owned after N6 archival, while archived evidence must remain append-only.
constraints: Do not modify archived N5/N6 evidence.
Keep no-active status and ownership checks passing.
intent.rationale: A dedicated cleanup record preserves archive immutability and gives generated status changes an auditable owner.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: No active Work Item status remains consistent and its generated diff is owned by the cleanup archive pair.
Immutable prior N5/N6 summaries are not modified while ownership is restored.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
